result.stdout:
Description:
  Benchmark Comparison Tool for comparing performance between commits

Usage:
  Benchy [command] [options]

Options:
  --verbose                                          Enable verbose output
  --output-directory <output-directory>              The directory to output benchmark results
  --output-style <output-style>                      Output styles to use (comma-separated). Valid values: console, json, markdown. Default: console for interactive mode, json,markdown for CI mode
  -b, --benchmark <benchmark>                        The benchmark project(s) to run
  --significance-threshold <significance-threshold>  Statistical significance threshold for benchmark comparisons (default: 0.05)
  --decoration                                       Enable colored output and symbols (default: auto-detected based on mode and output)
  --version                                          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                     Show help and usage information

Commands:
  compare <baseline> <target>  Compare benchmarks between two commits in a repository
  ci <baseline> <target>       Compare benchmarks between pre-checked-out directories in a CI environment

commands.payload:
Description:
  Benchmark Comparison Tool for comparing performance between commits

Usage:
  Benchy [command] [options]

Options:
  --verbose                                          Enable verbose output
  --output-directory <output-directory>              The directory to output benchmark results

Commands:
  compare <baseline> <target>  Compare benchmarks between two commits in a repository
  ci <baseline> <target>       Compare benchmarks between pre-checked-out directories in a CI environment

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compare benchmarks between pre-checked-out directories in a CI environment

Usage:
  Benchy ci <baseline> <target> [options]

Arguments:
  <baseline>  The directory containing the baseline version to compare
  <target>    The directory containing the target version to compare

Options:
  --verbose                                          Enable verbose output
  --output-directory <output-directory>              The directory to output benchmark results
  --output-style <output-style>                      Output styles to use (comma-separated). Valid values: console, json, markdown. Default: console for interactive mode, json,markdown for CI mode
  -b, --benchmark <benchmark>                        The benchmark project(s) to run
  --significance-threshold <significance-threshold>  Statistical significance threshold for benchmark comparisons (default: 0.05)
  --decoration                                       Enable colored output and symbols (default: auto-detected based on mode and output)
  -?, -h, --help                                     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Compare benchmarks between pre-checked-out directories in a CI environment

Usage:
  Benchy ci <baseline> <target> [options]

Arguments:
  <baseline>  The directory containing the baseline version to compare
  <target>    The directory containing the target version to compare

Options:
  --verbose                                          Enable verbose output
  --output-directory <output-directory>              The directory to output benchmark results
  --output-style <output-style>                      Output styles to use (comma-separated). Valid values: console, json, markdown. Default: console for interactive mode, json,markdown for CI mode
  -b, --benchmark <benchmark>                        The benchmark project(s) to run
  --significance-threshold <significance-threshold>  Statistical significance threshold for benchmark comparisons (default: 0.05)
  --decoration                                       Enable colored output and symbols (default: auto-detected based on mode and output)
  -?, -h, --help                                     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compare benchmarks between two commits in a repository

Usage:
  Benchy compare <baseline> [<target>] [options]

Arguments:
  <baseline>  The commit reference (hash, branch, or tag) to the baseline version
  <target>    The commit reference (hash, branch, or tag) to the target version (defaults to currently checked out version)

Options:
  -r, --repo, --repository-path <repository-path>    The path to the local Git repository (auto-detected from current directory if not specified)
  --no-delete                                        Do not delete the temporary directories after running the benchmarks
  --verbose                                          Enable verbose output
  --output-directory <output-directory>              The directory to output benchmark results
  --output-style <output-style>                      Output styles to use (comma-separated). Valid values: console, json, markdown. Default: console for interactive mode, json,markdown for CI mode
  -b, --benchmark <benchmark>                        The benchmark project(s) to run
  --significance-threshold <significance-threshold>  Statistical significance threshold for benchmark comparisons (default: 0.05)
  --decoration                                       Enable colored output and symbols (default: auto-detected based on mode and output)
  -?, -h, --help                                     Show help and usage information
